NoXpConningMsg.SourceString: No Homebase XP will be earned.
NoXpConningMsg.LocalizedString: No Homebase XP will be earned.

OutpostRefundDialogText.SourceString: Due to a recent level change, your Outpost has been reset. Don't worry, all of the resources and traps used to build the Outpost have been safely stored away inside your Outpost Storage inventory! To access your storage, interact with your Outpost and click on the Storage tab.
OutpostRefundDialogText.LocalizedString: Due to a recent level change, your Outpost has been reset. Don't worry, all of the resources and traps used to build the Outpost have been safely stored away inside your Outpost Storage inventory! To access your storage, interact with your Outpost and click on the Storage tab.
